responses: Hello! Welcome to our support center. How can I help you today?
Hi there! What can I do for you?
Hey! I'm here to help with your order, shipping, refunds, or account questions.
Goodbye! Feel free to reach out anytime.
Take care! Have a great day.
Bye! Let us know if you need anything else.
You're welcome!
Happy to help!
Anytime! Is there anything else I can help with?
You can track your order using the tracking link sent to your email. Could you share your order ID so I can check it for you?
I can help track that. Please provide your order number.
Let me look into your order status — can you share your order ID?

patterns: how do I get a refund
responses: I'm sorry to hear that. Refunds are processed within 5-7 business days after we receive the returned item. Would you like me to start the return process?
You can request a refund from the Orders page within 30 days of delivery. Do you want me to initiate that for you?
Let's get that sorted — can you share your order ID so I can start the refund process?
Standard shipping takes 3-5 business days and is free on orders above ₹499. Express delivery takes 1-2 days for an extra fee.
We currently ship across India, with delivery typically taking 3-5 business days depending on your location.
Sorry about that! Payment issues are usually resolved within 24 hours. Could you share the transaction ID so I can check?
I understand how frustrating that is. Let me look into your payment — please share your transaction reference number.
You can reset your password from the login page using 'Forgot Password'. Would you like me to send a reset link to your registered email?
Let's get you back in — I can send a password reset link. Can you confirm your registered email?

patterns: I'm very unhappy with the service
responses: I'm really sorry about that experience. Let's fix this right away — could you share your order ID and a photo of the issue so I can escalate it?
That's not the experience we want for you. I'll flag this for priority resolution — can you provide your order ID?

patterns: I want to speak with a person
responses: Sure, connecting you to a human support agent now. Please hold on.
No problem — I'll transfer this conversation to a live agent.
I'm not fully sure I understood that. Could you rephrase, or ask about order status, refunds, shipping, payments, or your account?
Sorry, I didn't quite get that. I can help with orders, refunds, shipping, payments, or account issues.
